## Context

PR #1266 implemented the Instructor role with per-course permissions. The admin branch in the dashboard API is stubbed (`courseIds = []`) at `src/app/api/instructor/dashboard/route.ts:40–43`, so admins always see an empty course list. This fix expands the admin view to show all courses with their assigned instructors/TAs.

## Changes

### 1. API — `src/app/api/instructor/dashboard/route.ts`

- Return `courses[].ins… [+2894 chars]
